systems.system_notes: Proximal femoral cephalomedullary nailing platform anchored to the official Smith+Nephew TRIGEN META-NAIL product page.

trays.tray_notes: Official Smith+Nephew materials support a dedicated TRIGEN META-NAIL instrumentation workflow for proximal femoral cephalomedullary nailing.

components.component_notes: Primary proximal femoral nail component described by the official TRIGEN META-NAIL materials.
The TRIGEN META-NAIL construct includes proximal lag screw fixation options.
The TRIGEN META-NAIL construct includes distal locking fixation options.
End-cap compatibility is part of the TRIGEN META-NAIL construct family.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public TRIGEN META-NAIL source confirms the implant family but this pass does not include the full sterile implant code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU, inventory control form, or catalogue pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
